## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Airbyte and GrowthX to discuss content creation progress, brand guidelines, and workflow updates.](https://fathom.video/share/8AQ4HjJZNKSSuyiKp49y-1NaoD_yiiuE?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New brand guidelines are available; Airbyte team to send updated Figma file and templates](https://fathom.video/share/8AQ4HjJZNKSSuyiKp49y-1NaoD_yiiuE?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Content creation process transitioning from Aerobs to GrowthX's own product next week](https://fathom.video/share/8AQ4HjJZNKSSuyiKp49y-1NaoD_yiiuE?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Target of 15 articles per week, with an average word count of \~3,000 words](https://fathom.video/share/8AQ4HjJZNKSSuyiKp49y-1NaoD_yiiuE?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [New Looker dashboards available for improved reporting and analytics](https://fathom.video/share/8AQ4HjJZNKSSuyiKp49y-1NaoD_yiiuE?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)

## Topics

### Brand Guidelines Update

  - [Current brand guidelines have changed; old templates are being used](https://fathom.video/share/8AQ4HjJZNKSSuyiKp49y-1NaoD_yiiuE?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [Airbyte team to send new Figma file and templates to David](https://fathom.video/share/8AQ4HjJZNKSSuyiKp49y-1NaoD_yiiuE?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Nora requested to follow the same template across all websites](https://fathom.video/share/8AQ4HjJZNKSSuyiKp49y-1NaoD_yiiuE?tab=summary&timestamp=357.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Currently using Aerobs and ChatGPT for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/8AQ4HjJZNKSSuyiKp49y-1NaoD_yiiuE?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [Transitioning to GrowthX's own product next week for improved efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/8AQ4HjJZNKSSuyiKp49y-1NaoD_yiiuE?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Supplementing with ChatGPT and Reflectity when necessary](https://fathom.video/share/8AQ4HjJZNKSSuyiKp49y-1NaoD_yiiuE?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [New team member (Faye) joining to help with content creation](https://fathom.video/share/8AQ4HjJZNKSSuyiKp49y-1NaoD_yiiuE?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)

### Article Specifications

  - [Average word count: \~3,000 words per article](https://fathom.video/share/8AQ4HjJZNKSSuyiKp49y-1NaoD_yiiuE?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [Following Surfer SEO reports for optimal content length and structure](https://fathom.video/share/8AQ4HjJZNKSSuyiKp49y-1NaoD_yiiuE?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Aiming for a score of 80 or higher on Surfer SEO](https://fathom.video/share/8AQ4HjJZNKSSuyiKp49y-1NaoD_yiiuE?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Target: 15 articles per week (30-35 per month)](https://fathom.video/share/8AQ4HjJZNKSSuyiKp49y-1NaoD_yiiuE?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)

### Workflow and Reporting

  - [Two-step process for publishing: uploading articles, then applying schema](https://fathom.video/share/8AQ4HjJZNKSSuyiKp49y-1NaoD_yiiuE?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [New Looker dashboards available for improved reporting and analytics](https://fathom.video/share/8AQ4HjJZNKSSuyiKp49y-1NaoD_yiiuE?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Jacob posted updates in Slack for review](https://fathom.video/share/8AQ4HjJZNKSSuyiKp49y-1NaoD_yiiuE?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)

### Content Topics

  - [Over 50 topics already provided to GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/8AQ4HjJZNKSSuyiKp49y-1NaoD_yiiuE?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Tanmay continuing research for additional topics](https://fathom.video/share/8AQ4HjJZNKSSuyiKp49y-1NaoD_yiiuE?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Airbyte team to send new brand guidelines and Figma file to David](https://fathom.video/share/8AQ4HjJZNKSSuyiKp49y-1NaoD_yiiuE?tab=summary&timestamp=359.0)
  - [David to create new image covers using updated templates](https://fathom.video/share/8AQ4HjJZNKSSuyiKp49y-1NaoD_yiiuE?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Tiandra to complete drafting remaining articles and apply schemas](https://fathom.video/share/8AQ4HjJZNKSSuyiKp49y-1NaoD_yiiuE?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [GrowthX team to start using their new content creation product next week](https://fathom.video/share/8AQ4HjJZNKSSuyiKp49y-1NaoD_yiiuE?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Airbyte team to review new Looker dashboards and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/8AQ4HjJZNKSSuyiKp49y-1NaoD_yiiuE?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Tiandra to send final day report of completed work](https://fathom.video/share/8AQ4HjJZNKSSuyiKp49y-1NaoD_yiiuE?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
